title: Opening for Software Engineer at Curefit

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Curefit
jsonLd.description:
Curefit invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit:
Curefit is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit!
